mainEntity.name: Can remote workers claim respiratory issues from home office mold linked to employer?
mainEntity.text: Can remote workers claim respiratory issues from home office mold linked to employer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rarely; Utah requires direct work nexus—employer-provided workspace mold may qualify if during duties.

suggestedAnswer.text: Prove employer negligence in home setup. PFTs pre/post. Low success (10%); comp covers remediation, treatment. Hybrid workers track site-specific.

name: Remote Work Respiratory Claims in Utah
description: Rarely; Utah requires direct work nexus—employer-provided workspace mold may qualify if during duties.
